title: cybianthus iteoides
intro: Cybianthus iteoides, also known as "yerba de la montaña" or mountain tea, is a plant species in the family Primulaceae native to the Andean region of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cybianthus iteoides include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Cybianthus iteoides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
